name: Neil Abercrombie
tweet: "I want to close with something that exemplifies what aloha is about. “A'ohe Hana Nui Ke Alu 'Ia”–no task is too big when done together"

name: Neil Abercrombie
tweet: "That is why I have assigned Lt. Gov @Brianschatz to coordinate and support our energy priorities."

name: Neil Abercrombie
tweet: "Currently there are about 80 renewable energy projects that are demonstrating progress.. to help achieve our collective energy goals."

name: Neil Abercrombie
tweet: "In moving forward on our path to advance a clean energy future, failure is not an option."

name: Neil Abercrombie
tweet: "An emergency appropriation grant of $1.8 million to the National Kidney Foundation of Hawai'i will support this important health service"

name: Neil Abercrombie
tweet: "I am proposing $1.4 million to create one-stop shops across the state for information on aging, to assist all of our kupuna."

name: Neil Abercrombie
tweet: "The link between sugar beverages & health is undeniable. I have proposed a task force..to implement a solution to this health issue."

name: Neil Abercrombie
tweet: "Early childhood education must be the initial step on the education ladder.  Failure to act now ensures that our children will fall behind"

name: Neil Abercrombie
tweet: "We will be requesting the legislature look at the TV & Film Tax Credit with the intention of drafting changes in making it permanent."

name: Neil Abercrombie
tweet: "I am proposing that we invest $5 million in protecting our watersheds... we must save Hawai'i’s forests and watersheds."

name: Neil Abercrombie
tweet: "We will move forward on Hawaii Broadband by requesting $2.9 million to enhance online services..to provide laptops for every student"

name: Neil Abercrombie
tweet: "Our recent bond of $1.3 billion, along with $1 billion of projects already on the budget books..will spur an immediate rise in job growth."

name: Neil Abercrombie
tweet: "We instituted fiscal prudence...The result was a balance of $126 million. This was the first positive balance achieved in 3 years"

name: Neil Abercrombie
tweet: "Payroll employment increased 1.3% after 3 years of decline. Initial unemployment claims declined 8% in 2011. Bankruptcies dropped 15.9%. "

name: Neil Abercrombie
tweet: "We must continue our focus on our children and students’ performance.  We cannot wait any longer."

name: Neil Abercrombie
tweet: "Thank you, especially to our state employees, who agreed to labor savings and additional payments for health benefits."

name: Neil Abercrombie
tweet: "By working together and through shared sacrifice, we have started to turn the corner."
